nodes.context: Historical Sicilian Mafia clan from Castellammare del Golfo, active from 1910s to 1986, controlled Trapani mandamento.
Mafia family in Trapani, led by Minore clan from the 1950s.
Sicilian Mafia clan from Corleone, led by Totò Riina, involved in Second Mafia War.
Sicilian Mafia clan from Castellammare del Golfo, allied with Minore clan.
Mafia family in Catania, allied with Minore clan.
Sicilian Mafia clan, rival of Minore and Buccellato clans in the 1960s-1970s.
Organized crime syndicate in the United States, connected to Minore via Salvatore Maranzano.
American Mafia family, linked to Totò Minore after his emigration to the US.
Sicilian Mafia family headed by Gaetano Badalamenti, related to Rimi clan.
Same as Corleonesi, but mentioned separately in text.

edges.evidence_quote: From the 1950s, the Minore clan led the Trapani Mafia family
edges.context: Minore clan led the Trapani Mafia family from the 1950s.

edges.evidence_quote: Their leadership lasted until a falling out with the Corleonesi
edges.context: Minore clan had a falling out with Corleonesi, leading to assassination of Totò Minore.

edges.evidence_quote: The Minore clan went on to form a very strong alliance with the Buccellato Mafia clan
edges.context: Minore clan formed a strong alliance with Buccellato clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Totò Minore developed very close ties to the Catania Mafia family
edges.context: Minore clan had close ties with Catania Mafia family.

edges.evidence_quote: Both the Minore and Buccellato clan developed a fierce rivalry with the Rimi Mafia clan
edges.context: Minore clan had a fierce rivalry with Rimi clan in the 1960s-1970s.

edges.evidence_quote: in turn with the Mafia family of Cinisi headed by Gaetano Badalamenti
edges.context: Minore clan also had rivalry with the Mafia family of Cinisi, related to Rimi.

edges.evidence_quote: The emerging Corleonesi Mafia clan at this point backed the Minores and Buccellatos against the Rimis and Badalamentis
edges.context: Corleonesi initially backed Minore clan against Rimi and Badalamenti.

edges.evidence_quote: Totò Minore emigrated to the United States and linked up to the Gambino family
edges.context: Totò Minore linked up with Gambino family in the US.

edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Maranzano, who would later emigrate to the United States and become an important figure within the American Mafia
edges.context: Minore clan connected to American Mafia through Salvatore Maranzano.
